title: Nuclei Isolation from Mouse Lung for Single Nucleus RNASeq
author: Jeffrey Koenitzer
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bdv2i68e
materials: Pre-cool all instruments (including centrifuges), buffers, and tubes. Note: All steps are performed On ice or in cold room ( 4 °C ) to minimize RNA degradation.

steps.title: Remove mouse lung sample from -80...
steps.instruction: Remove mouse lung sample from -80 ºC freezer and trim a ~6 mm 3 piece .

steps.title: Transfer the minced tissue and buffer...
steps.instruction: Transfer the minced tissue and buffer to a GentleMacs C tube.

steps.title: Run m_lung_01 program and m_lung_02 program...
steps.instruction: Run m_lung_01 program and m_lung_02 program in sequence, stopping the latter after 00:00:20 . Foam after GentleMacs

steps.title: Reduce foam by centrifugation ( 750...
steps.instruction: Reduce foam by centrifugation ( 750 x g, °C, 1 minute ). Foam after centrifugation

steps.title: Wash strainer with 4 mL, Wash Buffer
steps.instruction: Wash strainer with 4 mL, Wash Buffer .

steps.title: Pass suspension through a 5 µm...
steps.instruction: Pass suspension through a 5 µm strainer into 50 ml conical tube.

steps.title: Count nuclei by hemocytometer and dilute to desired concentration (e
steps.instruction: Count nuclei by hemocytometer and dilute to desired concentration (e.g. 10,000 per µl). Note : it is easier to resuspend in lower volumes and dilute than to concentrate nuclei via further centrifugation. 40x Nuclear suspension with scant debris

steps.title: Thaw on small plastic weighing boat...
steps.instruction: Thaw on small plastic weighing boat until able to insert 26G needle to tissue, then inject ice cold 1 mL, Lysis Buffer to ‘inflate’ the tissue. Add the remaining Lysis Buffer and chop to the smallest pieces possible with scissors (60 s).

steps.title: Close, invert, and transfer directly to MACS Tissue dissociator
steps.instruction: Close, invert, and transfer directly to MACS Tissue dissociator.

steps.title: Using a wide bore tip, pipette...
steps.instruction: Using a wide bore tip, pipette up and down to recover any pelleted material and pass lysate through 40 µm filter to 50 ml conical tube.
